_comment: Canonical ReputationState document shape. Cross-chain agent reputation scoreboard. Owned exclusively by g8ee's Auditor (only writer + only reader): the data-access boundary in GDD §3 is enforced by keeping the only `reputation_state` reader inside `auditor_service.py` (and the post-execution writer `reputation_service.py` in Phase 3). A field mismatch breaks reputation persistence and Merkle root computation in `reputation_commitment`.
_consumers: g8ee (Auditor — reads via reputation_data_service to build per-verdict Merkle root)
g8ee (reputation_service — writes EMA updates post-execution; Phase 3)

reputation_state._description: Per-agent scalar reputation maintained as an exponential moving average across conversations. Scalar only; never history (GDD §5). Sybil resistance: zero-rep agents have no influence. One row per persona id (axiom, concord, variance, pragma, nemesis, sage, triage, auditor).

agent_id.description: Stable persona identifier (TribunalMember enum value, or 'sage' / 'triage' / 'auditor'). Used as the document id in the reputation_state collection.

scalar.description: EMA scalar in [0.0, 1.0]. 0.0 = no influence (Sybil floor); 1.0 = max influence. Bootstrap value is 0.5 (neutral).

unbonding_until.description: When the unbonding period ends after a Tier 1 slash. Null means the agent is in normal-influence operation.

last_slash_tier.description: Tier of the most recent slash event applied to this agent (per GDD §6). Null when no slash has occurred.

updated_at.description: When the scalar was last updated (UTC, ISO 8601 with Z suffix).
